2025/26 Season

Fixtures

GW33 — Upcoming matchups

Matches of the Week · GW33
Featured Match

Title Lock or Door Cracks Open

Home
bjennings28
17–15 · 2594 pts
vs
Away
erozier
21–11 · 3017 pts

erozier comes in at 21–11 with a 380-point lead on the field's points-for column — the regular-season title is his to lose, and a win here all but clinches the #1 seed with only four weeks left to play. bjennings28 has been steady all year and is fresh off a string of mid-ceiling games. If he hits a 95-plus week, erozier's wire-to-wire coronation stalls and Noahvillasana17 — sitting 20–12 and one back — suddenly has life.

Featured Match

Highest Offense Meets Lowest

Home
brendog2814
18–14 · 2902 pts
vs
Away
jacklynch213
13–19 · 2082 pts

brendog2814 has scored 2,902 points this season — second only to erozier and 820 clear of jacklynch213, who occupies the cellar with the league's lowest offense by nearly 400 points. It is, almost literally, a full season's worth of scoring difference. On paper a blowout, but brendog2814 can't afford to sleepwalk: a win jumps him into the #3-seed conversation with JordiCarb (19–13); a loss drops him closer to the playoff bubble than the top four.
